tasks.label: tsc-check
tasks.command: cd d:\WorkSpace\ECOLE\admin && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && echo TSC_OK || echo TSC_FAILED

tasks.label: tsc-verify
tasks.command: cd d:\WorkSpace\ECOLE\admin && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && echo TSC_OK || echo TSC_FAILED

tasks.label: tsc-check-admin
tasks.command: cd d:\WorkSpace\ECOLE\admin && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && echo TSC_OK || echo TSC_FAILED

tasks.label: tsc-final-check
tasks.command: cd d:\WorkSpace\ECOLE\admin && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && echo TSC_OK || echo TSC_FAILED

tasks.label: docker-build-all
tasks.command: cd d:\WorkSpace\ECOLE && Remove-Item -Recurse -Force backend\educonnect 2>$null; echo 'OLD_DIR_REMOVED' && docker compose build --no-cache 2>&1

tasks.label: cleanup-educonnect
tasks.command: cd d:\WorkSpace\ECOLE && if (Test-Path backend\educonnect) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force backend\educonnect; Write-Host 'Removed old educonnect directory' } else { Write-Host 'educonnect dir already removed' }

tasks.label: docker-full-build
tasks.command: cd d:\WorkSpace\ECOLE && Remove-Item -Recurse -Force backend\educonnect 2>$null; echo '=== Starting Docker build ===' && docker compose build 2>&1 && echo 'BUILD_SUCCESS' || echo 'BUILD_FAILED'

tasks.label: docker-build-all-services
tasks.command: cd d:\WorkSpace\ECOLE && Remove-Item -Recurse -Force backend\educonnect 2>$null; Write-Host '--- Removed old educonnect dir ---'; docker compose build 2>&1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'BUILD_SUCCESS' } else { Write-Host 'BUILD_FAILED' }
